untranslatable_reason: AEDB (Ascending/Descending Double Bottom) pattern requires visual chart pattern recognition and multi-bar structure detection. The allowed indicators cannot directly detect this candlestick/price pattern formation. Pattern completion point and the specific 3-month formation window would require custom pattern detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal is pattern-based and direction-dependent (BOTH breakout directions). Success rates provided: bull 78%/5%fail, bear 4%fail. Average rise 40%. Translated to generic moving average crossover as functional substitute, but this does NOT capture the actual AEDB pattern semantics. Manual implementation of AEDB pattern detection required.
